## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] Tested with `guardrail scan` against a real or mock project
- [ ] Ghost dependency mock test passes (package with postinstall, never imported, is detected)
- [ ] No `console.log` debug statements left in code
- [ ] README.md updated if commands or flags changed
- [ ] New IOC entries include advisory link or evidence
